thinks.think: Black and white shot shows a building corner with a sign reading "Hair Fairy" and a partial phone number. A street lamp stands against the sky on the left. White text appears at the bottom center stating "English subtitles will be displayed here." The camera remains static.

The subtitle text disappears from the bottom. The camera tilts downward, revealing the dark underside of the building's overhang and the shop front windows below. Reflections are visible in the glass of the storefront. The street lamp remains on the left against the sky as the view shifts lower.

The camera tilts down to reveal the street-level shop front. A man in a light suit stands left, hand near his face. To the right, a man in a dark jacket holds a bicycle, with another man behind him. A striped barber pole is mounted on the wall, and "ALCINA" text appears on the window glass near an "Open" sign.

A man in a dark leather jacket steps forward, spreading his arms wide. The camera focuses on his face as he shouts, with the subtitle 'VICKY!' appearing at the bottom center. Behind him, a man in a suit stands near the shop window, while another figure is partially visible near a striped barber pole and the number 42.

The scene cuts from the shouting man to a black screen with white text. Initially, "WITH" appears above "THE FOUR" in the center. Then, "GETTING A HAIRCUT" appears at the top, completing the title card "GETTING A HAIRCUT WITH THE FOUR".

The screen remains black with white serif text. The phrase "GETTING A HAIRCUT" is visible in large capital letters at the top center. Below it, "WITH" appears in smaller font, followed by "THE FOUR" in large capitals at the bottom, completing the full title sequence layout.

The text on the black screen changes to display only "THE FOUR" in large white serif letters. The scene then cuts to a dark interior shot where a blonde person stands behind a seated individual. White subtitles appear at the bottom reading "Because I won a living room concert from The Four".

The video cuts to a dimly lit interior where a blonde person stands behind a seated individual draped in a dark cape. To the right, tall bottles labeled 'ALCINA' rest on a shelf. Vertical blinds cover a window in the background. White subtitles at the bottom state, 'Because I won a living room concert from The Four'.

Inside the room, the blonde individual stands behind the seated person, raising hands to cut hair. The seated person wears a dark cape and faces forward. To the right, tall bottles labeled 'ALCINA' sit on a shelf. The subtitle 'Because I won a living room concert from The Four' remains at the bottom.

Inside the dimly lit room, the blonde individual stands behind the seated person wearing a dark cape. The standing person's hands are positioned near the seated person's head. On the right shelf, tall bottles labeled 'ALCINA' remain visible. The subtitle text at the bottom changes to read 'which was very well received'.

Inside the room, the blonde individual stands behind the seated person wearing a dark cape. Hands stay near the seated person's head. On the right shelf, tall bottles labeled 'ALCINA' remain visible. The subtitle text changes to read 'we decided to thank these men'.

The camera cuts to a closer profile view of the blonde individual cutting the seated person's hair with scissors. The subtitle 'we decided to thank these men' remains at the bottom. Shelves with bottles are visible in the background as the haircut proceeds.

The camera angle shifts to a wider view from behind the seated individual. The blonde person continues cutting hair with scissors. The subtitle text at the bottom changes to read "by giving them a free haircut". Shelves and a counter are visible in the background.

The blonde individual, wearing a dark top with an open shoulder, continues cutting the seated person's hair with scissors. The subtitle 'by giving them a free haircut' remains on screen. Shelves with bottles and salon equipment are visible in the background as the haircutting action persists.

The camera cuts to a frontal view of a man with short dark hair sitting in a chair facing forward, draped in a black cape. Behind him, a person styles his hair with raised hands. To the left, white bottles labeled 'ALCINA' stand on a shelf. Subtitles at the bottom display the text 'which I hope will also be well received'.

The view changes to a profile shot of the seated man facing left while the blonde stylist stands behind him. A person wearing a white shirt and baseball cap walks away in the background near a doorway. Shelves line the left wall. Subtitles display the text 'just as much as the living room concert.

A blonde woman stands behind a seated man, styling his hair with her hands. The man faces left in profile, wearing a black cape. In the background, a person in a white shirt and cap stands near a doorway. The subtitle 'just as much as the living room concert.' remains at the bottom.

Two men stand side-by-side facing the camera under fluorescent lights. The man on the left wears a black shirt and tie, while the man on the right wears a black button-up shirt. White subtitles at the bottom read "Hi, I'm Max and this is Matt" as they stand before patterned curtains.

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side facing the camera under fluorescent lights. The man on the left wears a tie. The background features patterned curtains. The subtitle text changes to "which you may or may not know." while their positions remain largely static.

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side under fluorescent lights. The man on the left raises his hand to touch the top of his head while the man on the right looks forward. The subtitle text disappears from the bottom of the screen as the man on the left smooths his hair back down.

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side. The man on the left lowers his hand from his hair while both men open their mouths to speak. White subtitles appear at the bottom reading "We are here to get our hair cut".

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side. The man on the left smiles broadly while the man on the right closes his mouth. The white subtitle text "We are here to get our hair cut" disappears from the bottom of the screen, leaving the lower portion of the frame empty.

Two men wearing black shirts stand side-by-side indoors. The man on the left smiles broadly while the man on the right speaks. New white subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen reading "because we gave away one fucking cool rockshow".

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side indoors. The white subtitle text at the bottom changes from "because we gave away one fucking cool rockshow" to "in someones living room." The man on the left maintains a smile while the man on the right continues speaking, facing forward.

The scene cuts to a black and white shot of a group playing instruments indoors. Four people are seated; one wears a white cap and plays a bass guitar, another plays an acoustic guitar, and a third plays an electric guitar. Beer bottles rest on the floor between the musicians.

In the black and white scene, a group performs music indoors. A man in a white cap plays bass guitar while another man beside him sings. To the right, a man plays an acoustic guitar. A woman sits on the far right edge. Beer bottles rest on the floor.

The scene becomes heavily blurred due to motion as the group continues to play instruments. The man in the white cap playing the bass guitar and the man on the right strumming an acoustic guitar remain visible but indistinct. The woman seated on the far right is also present in the blurry frame.

The scene shows a band playing instruments in black and white. A person in a dark shirt sits left with a guitar. Beside them, a singer performs while a person in a white cap plays bass. A black and white shot shows a band playing indoors. A person in a dark shirt plays guitar on the left. Beside them, a singer performs. Behind, a person in a white cap plays bass. To the right, another plays acoustic guitar. A woman sits on the far right. Beer bottles rest on the floor.

The scene remains heavily blurred with motion as the band continues playing. A person wearing a horizontally striped shirt leans forward into the frame from the left side. The scene cuts to a standing group where a person in the foreground wears a dark shirt with a large number '3' on the back and raises an arm. To the right, another individual lifts a bottle high in the air. A blonde person wearing sunglasses stands in the background.

People are dancing and cheering with arms raised in a dimly lit room. A person on the left wears a dark jacket over a white shirt. An individual in the background wears sunglasses. The footage becomes heavily blurred as the group moves energetically.

A blurry scene of people dancing with raised arms cuts to two men standing side-by-side in black shirts. The man on the left looks down while the man on the right faces forward. White subtitles appear at the bottom reading "that someone turned out to be Vicky".

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side indoors. The white subtitle text at the bottom changes to read "and she thought it'd be really cool". The man on the right speaks with his mouth open, while the man on the left looks forward. Patterned curtains hang in the background behind them.

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side indoors under fluorescent lighting. The man on the right speaks while the man on the left looks forward. White subtitles at the bottom read "and she thought it'd be really cool". Patterned curtains hang in the background behind them.

The scene cuts to a salon interior where a person in a white t-shirt sits facing a mirror, their reflection visible. Shelves stocked with bottles labeled "ALCINA" line the background wall. New white subtitles appear at the bottom reading "to thank us with a 'cutting' session".

A person in a white t-shirt sits in a salon chair facing a mirror, with shelves of 'ALCINA' bottles in the background. The individual turns from the mirror to face the camera directly while the subtitle 'to thank us with a 'cutting' session' remains at the bottom.

A person wearing a white t-shirt sits in a salon chair, turning from the mirror to face the camera directly. They smile and raise both hands to give a double thumbs-up gesture. summary.text: [0-2] A black and white shot shows a "Hair Fairy" sign with partial number "010-418..." and a street lamp. Text "English subtitles will be displayed here." appears. [2-4] The subtitle vanishes as the camera tilts down, revealing the shop overhang and windows. [4-6] At street level, a man in a light suit stands left with hand near face; a man in a dark jacket holds a bicycle right, with another man behind. "ALCINA" and "Open" are on the window near a barber pole. [6-8] The man in the leather jacket steps forward with arms wide, shouting "VICKY!" near wall number "42". [8-12] Title cards on a black screen display "GETTING A HAIRCUT WITH THE FOUR" in white serif text, transitioning to just "THE FOUR". [12-14] The scene cuts to a dark interior where a blonde person stands behind a seated individual. Subtitles read: "Because I won a living room concert from The Four".

[18-22] Inside a dimly lit room, a blonde individual stands behind a seated person wearing a dark cape, hands positioned near the head. Tall bottles labeled 'ALCINA' are visible on a right shelf. The subtitle reads "which was very well received" before changing to "we decided to thank these men". [22-24] The camera cuts to a closer profile view as the blonde individual cuts the seated person's hair with scissors, with shelves visible in the background. [24-28] The angle shifts to a wider view from behind. The blonde person, wearing a dark top with an open shoulder, continues cutting hair. The subtitle updates to "by giving them a free haircut" as shelves and salon equipment remain visible in the background.

[28-34] A man with short dark hair sits in a black cape while a blonde woman styles his hair; 'ALCINA' bottles are visible on a shelf. A person in a white shirt and cap stands in the background. Subtitles read "which I hope will also be well received" and "just as much as the living room concert." [34-38] Two men stand side-by-side facing the camera in front of patterned curtains. The man on the left wears a black shirt and tie, while the man on the right wears a black button-up. Subtitles state "Hi, I'm Max and this is Matt" then "which you may or may not know."

Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side under fluorescent lights. The man on the left raises his hand to touch the top of his head while the man on the right looks forward. As the left man smooths his hair down, previous text disappears. Both men open their mouths to speak as the subtitle "We are here to get our hair cut" appears. The man on the left smiles broadly while the text vanishes. New white subtitles appear reading "because we gave away one fucking cool rockshow" as the man on the right speaks. Finally, the text changes to "in someones living room." while the man on the left maintains a smile and the man on the right continues facing forward.

[50-58] In a black and white indoor setting, a group performs music. A man in a white cap plays a bass guitar while a man beside him sings. To the right, a man in a light shirt plays an acoustic guitar, and a person in a dark shirt plays a guitar in the foreground left. A woman sits on the far right edge, and beer bottles rest on the floor. From 52-54s, the scene becomes heavily blurred due to motion, making the figures indistinct, before returning to clarity.

[58-62] In a black and white scene, a band plays instruments while the image becomes heavily blurred from rapid motion. Seated figures, including a bassist in a white cap and an acoustic guitarist on the right, remain in position but appear indistinct, with beer bottles vaguely visible on the floor. A person in a horizontally striped shirt leans into the frame from the left. [62-66] The scene cuts to a standing group where a person in the foreground wears a dark shirt with a large number '3' on the back and raises an arm. To the right, another individual lifts a bottle high. A blonde person wearing sunglasses stands in the background as people dance and cheer with arms raised in a dimly lit room. A person on the left wears a dark jacket over a white shirt, and the footage blurs heavily as the group moves energetically.

[66-68] A blurry scene of people dancing with raised arms cuts to two men standing side-by-side in black shirts. The man on the left looks down while the man on the right faces forward as white subtitles appear reading "that someone turned out to be Vicky". [68-72] The subtitle changes to "who is a professional hairdresser," while the man on the right speaks with his mouth open and the man on the left looks forward with a neutral expression near patterned curtains. [72-74] The text updates to "and she thought it'd be really cool" as the man on the right continues speaking.

[74-76] Two men in black shirts stand side-by-side indoors under fluorescent lighting with patterned curtains behind them; the man on the right speaks while the man on the left looks forward, accompanied by subtitles reading "and she thought it'd be really cool". [76-82] The scene cuts to a salon interior where a person in a white t-shirt sits facing a mirror, their reflection visible alongside shelves stocked with bottles labeled "ALCINA". As subtitles appear reading "to thank us with a 'cutting' session", the individual turns from the mirror to face the camera directly, smiles, and raises both hands to give a double thumbs-up gesture.

[82-84] The scene cuts to a low-angle shot focusing on legs in black trousers and shiny shoes, revealing leopard-print socks as one leg crosses the other, with another pair of shoes in the background; subtitles at the bottom read "so as a thank you we can get a haircut here." [84-86] Two men sit on a white couch; the left figure wears a dark shirt while the right figure wears a white shirt and tie, holding a newspaper with the headline 'Wat gaat u doen voor de buren?'. [86-88] The subtitle updates to "and that's why we are here." as the man on the right continues looking at the paper. [88-90] The scene transitions from two men on a couch to a man sitting in a salon chair facing right, with shelves displaying bottles labeled 'ALCINA' behind him, while the subtitle remains.

[14-18] In a dimly lit interior with vertical blinds, a blonde person stands behind a seated individual wearing a dark cape, cutting their hair. Tall bottles labeled 'ALCINA' sit on a shelf to the right. Subtitles state, "Because I won a living room concert from The Four". [48-50] The scene shifts to black and white, showing four people seated indoors playing instruments, including a bass guitar held by someone in a white cap, an acoustic guitar, and an electric guitar, with beer bottles on the floor. [90-96] In another black and white shot, three men stand together; the left holds a camcorder on a tripod, the center wears a black shirt, and the right wears a backwards cap and hoodie. The left man touches his hair while the right holds a white cup. Subtitles read, "if you're ever in the neighbourhood, we recommend coming here. it's at the Molenvijver and you might just see us." They cheer with raised arms before the video cuts to a man in a dark suit walking forward as a hand reaches for 'ALCINA' bottles in the foreground.

[98-100] A man in a dark suit walks toward the left edge, partially exiting the view. The subtitle text disappears from the bottom of the screen. The scene cuts to a young man in a black shirt standing indoors, smiling broadly. [100-106] A man in a dark top appears in the left foreground holding a white cup, then smiles broadly at the camera. Beside him, the young man in the black shirt smiles while looking off-camera. The white subtitle text `a "hitting-on-you-session".` is displayed at the bottom against a background of vertical blinds and bottles. [106-108] The scene cuts to a salon mirror reflection showing a person in a black cape seated while a blonde woman stands behind them. A man in a white shirt stands near a window in the background. In the foreground, the back of a head is visible on the left, and a shelf holds white bottles labeled "ALCINA" on the right.

[110-112] Two men sit on a white couch; the man on the left lowers a white mug to his lap while the man on the right holds a phone, and previous subtitles disappear. [112-120] The scene shifts to a salon where a young man with dark hair sits in profile facing left. A blonde hairdresser stands behind him, trimming the back of his neck near shelves of bottles. Subtitles appear sequentially: first "Why does your hair need to be so neat?", then changing to "We're going to Bremen soon!", and finally a dialogue exchange "- You don't say? - Yeah.." as she continues working on his hair.

[124-126] In a mirror reflection framed by shelves of white "ALCINA" bottles, a man in a dark suit turns left in the background while the subtitle "We'll have a living room concert on the 17th of October" displays at the bottom. [126-128] The camera angle switches to show a blonde woman in a black top standing behind a seated young man, smiling down with hands near his neck as subtitles change to the dialogue "- No, really? - Yeah". [128-130] The woman continues working on the young man's hair while the text updates to the sentence "That can never be as much fun as my living room concert-". [130-132] The woman remains standing behind the young man, smiling, as the final dialogue exchange appears on screen: "- Seriously? - No way..".

[132-134] In a profile view, a man wearing a black cape sits in a salon chair facing right while a hairdresser stands left with scissors and a comb. Behind them are vertical blinds and a poster of a woman. The subtitle "You're talking shit." appears. [134-136] The text vanishes as a man in a dark suit appears outside the glass door. [136-138] The hairdresser cuts the client's hair while the suited man watches from outside. [138-140] A close-up shows the seated man's head and the suited man looking through the window bars as a hand touches the client's neck.

[140-144] The camera zooms tightly on a man in a dark suit standing outside a window, framed by vertical bars, looking inward with a neutral expression while the back of a seated client's head is visible in the foreground; the shot holds on his face behind the bars before cutting completely to black. [144-148] The scene cuts to a man in a light, patterned button-down shirt standing in a salon, smiling with both hands raised behind his head adjusting his hair. White subtitles appear at the bottom reading '- What's your name? Hans Cornelisse'. As he continues to smile and fix his hair, the text disappears, showing shelves with white 'ALCINA' bottles against patterned wallpaper in the background.

[148-152] Inside a salon, a man in a patterned shirt sits in profile as subtitles read "And why are you at this particular hairdresser?" then "It's close by!". A mirror reflects a young client in a black cape seated with a blonde hairdresser behind him. White bottles labeled "ALCINA" line a shelf.
[152-154] The subtitle changes to "Amersfoort." A young man with dark hair sits in the foreground facing left. In the mirror, the blonde woman stands behind the client near the "ALCINA" bottles and a price sign.
[154-156] The scene shifts outside to three men near a barber pole. One wears a backpack, another a dark jacket and tie, and the third a leather jacket holding a cup. The man with the backpack turns to the camera as the subtitle "Is it still filming?" appears.

[156-164] Outside a shop near a striped barber pole, a man with a backpack stands in the foreground. A man in a dark suit and tie appears behind him, joining a man in a leather jacket nearby. The group stands on the sidewalk. The man with the backpack looks down then up at the camera, smiling. White subtitles appear at the bottom reading "Thank you Vicky, for this beautiful.." as the men stand together. The subtitle text changes to "back-thanks" of.." while the three men shift their gaze slightly but remain in position near the shop entrance.

[164-166] Subtitle: "back-thanks" yeah, that's precisely what I wanted to say. Near a barber pole, a man in a leather jacket smiles while a man with a backpack looks down; a man in a suit stands between. [166-168] Subtitle: "I thought you had media-training." A man in a leather jacket lifts a white cup; the man with a backpack looks down; a man in a dark jacket stands right. [168-170] The man in the dark jacket/backpack looks down while the man in the leather jacket smiles; subtitle "I had media-training." disappears. [170-172] Subtitle: "No thanks for the.. - The 'back-thanks'". The man with the backpack is foreground; a man in a suit/tie looks forward; a man in a leather jacket holds a white cup; another man in a dark jacket stands near the pole.

[172-174] The subtitle "The 'back-thanks' by cutting our hair." displays as a man in the foreground bows his head slightly. A man in a suit looks forward, standing near a striped barber pole with two others, one holding a white cup. [174-176] Text changes to "It was yummy." The man in the suit and tie stands centrally, flanked by two men in dark leather jackets. A fourth man is partially visible on the far left edge. [176-178] The subtitle updates to "See you soon!" as the group of four stands outside. [178-180] The text disappears. The man on the far left is partially cropped while the man in the suit faces forward. The man beside him in a leather jacket holds the white cup. Behind them, a window displays an "Open" sign with a scissors graphic.
